TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_gaga_utux_Nni‚Äôan, title = gaga_utux_Nni‚Äôan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/gaga_utux_Nni‚Äôan} }

S.FORM: gaga utux Nni'an kwara hi na gaga na utux Nni'an ga hnyasun nya gaga na utux Bbwan kwe, khmey ha'iy hi na utux gaga Snlitan kwe ga, ana ci nanak utux gaga Nni'an, ana ci sa'ing tipik na gaga Snlitan mso'un ro mra' utux gaga Nni'an, sgagey iyat ga mso'un utux gaga na Snlitan ga, gaga na Nni'an musa skbaley. Pntyagan na gaga Nni'an kwe ga musa rmow yow na pns'unan, gaga na shri'an, ro yow na m'apal, ro pkuri', p'ilis cyoli, ro yow na wa kmun urow cyoli, gaga na Nni'an ga skbaley yow ro skbaley tyagan glgan mtiyow, ro pplahang inyanux Tayal. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śĪüśėéśłÖYawi‚ÄßNomin, .

gaga utux Nni'an kwara hi na gaga na utux Nni'an ga hnyasun nya gaga na utux Bbwan kwe, khmey ha'iy hi na utux gaga Snlitan kwe ga, ana ci nanak utux gaga Nni'an, ana ci sa'ing tipik na gaga Snlitan mso'un ro mra' utux gaga Nni'an, sgagey iyat ga mso'un utux gaga na Snlitan ga, gaga na Nni'an musa skbaley. Pntyagan na gaga Nni'an kwe ga musa rmow yow na pns'unan, gaga na shri'an, ro yow na m'apal, ro pkuri', p'ilis cyoli, ro yow na wa kmun urow cyoli, gaga na Nni'an ga skbaley yow ro skbaley tyagan glgan mtiyow, ro pplahang inyanux Tayal. Bnrwan qa galan cpung śĪüśėéśłÖYawi‚ÄßNomin, .
